style_effects: Gentle sparkling dust trails drift upward like powdered sugar, dissolving into iridescent petals that pulse softly with a pastel lavender glow. A delicate, petal-shaped aura radiates from the body in concentric rings, refracting light into shimmering rainbows. Warm, soft pink lighting bathes the scene with a gentle luminescence, casting faint musical note vibrations that ripple through the air. Clean cel-shaded Pokémon illustration style with bold outlines and soft shading.
